# Story 2-2: Second Story in Epic 2

## Story Header

| Field | Value |

## Story Requirements

### User Story

As a developer,
I want to test multiple stories in same epic,
so that all stories link to their parent correctly.

## Developer Context

### Technical Requirements

- Both 2-1 and 2-2 should link to Epic 2
- Order in mapping doesn't matter
